description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and run, using the chusiang/ansible:alpine-3.6 Docker image for both jobs and tagging them with docker. In the test stage add a syntax_check job that runs make syntax_check and does not allow failure. In the run stage add a run_playbook job that runs ansible-playbook setup.yml. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
